scripts.db:migrate:postgres: pnpm run db:prepare:postgres-migrate && prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/postgres/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy:postgres: pnpm run db:prepare:postgres-migrate && prisma migrate deploy --schema=./prisma/postgres/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:status:postgres: pnpm run db:prepare:postgres-migrate && prisma migrate status --schema=./prisma/postgres/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:baseline:postgres: pnpm run db:prepare:postgres-migrate && prisma migrate resolve --schema=./prisma/postgres/schema.prisma --applied 20260606000000_init
